sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28276" key="drakontobo/tos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δρᾰκοντο-βότος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28276.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feeding dragons,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:356" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.356</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
